heading: Selective capital increase and amendment of the Articles of Agreement
label: 282o Selective capital increase and amendment of the Articles of Agreement

children.heading: Vote authorized
children.label: a Vote authorized
children.text: The United States Governor of the Corporation is authorized to vote in favor of a resolution to increase the capital stock of the Corporation by $130,000,000.

children.heading: Amendment of the Articles of Agreement
children.label: b Amendment of the Articles of Agreement
children.text: The United States Governor of the Corporation is authorized to agree to and accept an amendment to Article IV, Section 3(a) of the Articles of Agreement of the Corporation that achieves an increase in basic votes to 5.55 percent of total votes.
